hero.title: Best Sri Lankan Gem Stones
hero.subtitle: Rare Ceylon sapphires, rubies and collector stones — hand-selected and delivered direct from the legendary mines of Rathnapura.
hero.description: Discover the finest Sri Lankan gem stones directly from the mines of Rathnapura, Sri Lanka's legendary gem capital.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Kamara Selections was founded by two friends: Ralph from Switzerland and Kamal from Sri Lanka. Friends for over 44 years, they built this gem business with mining partners in Rathnapura, known as the City of Gems. Their long-standing partnership and hands-on expertise help us deliver some of the best Sri Lankan gemstones with trusted sourcing.
about.heritageDesc: Built by two friends with 40+ years of trust
about.qualityDesc: Hand-selected gems from our own mines

gemstones.title: Treasures of the Island of Gems
gemstones.subtitle: Eight of the most sought-after gems found in Sri Lanka — hand-selected from our Rathnapura mining partners.
gemstones.ctaText: Looking for a specific stone, cut or carat weight? Our team can source it directly from the mine.

sapphire.name: Blue Sapphire
sapphire.description: The royal blue that made Ceylon legendary.

ruby.name: Ruby
ruby.description: Deep, fiery red of rare beauty.

catseye.name: Cat's Eye
catseye.description: A living band of silvery light.

alexandrite.name: Alexandrite
alexandrite.description: Green by day, red by night.

spinel.name: Spinel
spinel.description: Vivid violet fire, a Ceylon prize.

aquamarine.name: Cobalt spinel
aquamarine.description: The clear blue of the ocean.

rubyDiamond.name: Ruby
rubyDiamond.description: Deep, fiery red of rare beauty.

media.title: See the journey of our gemstones
media.subtitle: From riverbed gravel to precision faceting, experience the process through short clips and photos.
media.videosSubtitle: Short, muted clips you can play to glimpse our daily work.
media.gallerySubtitle: Still moments from our mines and workshops.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Interested in our gemstones? Contact us to discuss your requirements.
contact.locationValue: 26/6, Rajamal Uyana, Baddagana Road, Pitakotte, Sri Lanka
contact.sriLankaPhoneNotice: This Sri Lankan number works only while Ralph is in Sri Lanka. When he is outside Sri Lanka, please contact him on WhatsApp.

footer.blurb: Trusted sourcing directly from Rathnapura mines with full transparency, consistency, and concierge-level service.
